speaker: Lysa at the Lantern Cup
title: Calm eastern lanes
text: Captains coming in from Varenna say the eastern lane has been calm lately. Safe profits are better than brave losses.

speaker: Old Ferrin
title: Cheap grain moves fast
text: Grain leaves here cheap, but don't sit on it too long. Every small harbor master thinks staple cargo is his best idea.

speaker: Ida the Factor
title: Cloth buyers inland
text: There is always another buyer for good cloth. If your hold is empty in Varenna, you are probably making a mistake.

speaker: Sailor Bren
title: Watch the deadlines
text: The contracts here look easy until you lose a day in rough water. Quick routes matter more than greedy routes.

speaker: Captain Sorell
title: Spice pays, but bites
text: Spice can make a captain rich by dusk and broke by dawn. The buyers are generous and the waters are not.

speaker: Dockhand Pell
title: Heavy weather north
text: Northbound ships have been coming in scraped raw. Fine cargo is no comfort when the hull starts singing in a storm.

speaker: Quartermaster Toma
title: Oil is steady money
text: Oil won't make you legendary, but steady captains retire better than famous ones.

speaker: Harbor cook Sena
title: Stock up before risk
text: No captain boasts about buying spare stores, but the hungry ones stop boasting entirely.

speaker: Archivist Nera
title: Luxury buyers are patient until they are not
text: The rich in Thalos pay well for rare cargo, but miss a contract and they remember your name for the wrong reason.

speaker: House Agent Meret
title: Big holds, bigger mistakes
text: A larger ship forgives many things, but it also tempts captains into routes they have not earned yet.
